Hey Les.. can you pass this email on to JE please..thanks.
-----Forwarded Message----- 
From: Ana Elisa Aguiar 
Sent: Nov 28, 2007 1:46 PM 
To: kellens@earthlink.net, Thiago Bernardes , Nuno Quintela , bernardo@bja.com.br, Paulo Jacobsen 
Subject: Schedule 

﻿ 
 
Sara,
 
We would like to schedule the presentation of the preliminary studie.
 
We need the longest time that we can have, so we think that maybe  december 15th will be good. 
Those are good dates for Jeffrey?
 
For this metting will be participating Thiago Bernardes, Paulo Jacobsen and the landcape designer Fernando Chacel.
Where this metting can be? In the island or in another place?
 
Thanks You,
 
Ana Elisa Aguiar
arquiteta 
Bernardes + Jacobsen Arquitetura
www.bernardesjacobsen.com.br
Rua Corcovado casa 250
Jardim Botânico - RJ - BRASIL 
CEP 22460-050
tel/fax: 55 11 2512-7743

subject: Re: Schedule
body:
J.p.   I am concerned that we are falling way behind schedule... 
over six weeks ago , I was assured I would received a new terrace plan for the library and how it meets, the land,, I have yet to receive,,  I was told I would get  an interior elevation, of at least one room in each building , so we could think about vocabulary,, I have yet to receive,, I was told that I would receive full elvations of the pool building,, and interiors, I have yet to receive,, I am sensitive to your no t feeling well, and have been patient,, the holdiays are approaching quickly, and we are very far behind.. I was supposed to have a budget for the pool building, last week, but have no interior details whatsover and it';s december. I will be on the isalnd this weekind if you feel up to it to talk.. The pace , needs to be greatly accelerated.. WE are over a year into this. 

----- Original Message ----
From: "jpm6929@aol.com" <jpm6929@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Monday, November 27, 2006 12:38:19 PM
Subject: Schedule


Hi Jeffrey,



I was able to set up a visit to Guermantes for Monday the 4th at 2 p.m. Also I have arranged a tentative visit to Saint Petersbourg on Tuesday the 5 th . We can go there either Monday evening or Tuesday and come back Wesnesday morning. I moved my thing to Wednesday evening. Also y explained to them who was the buyer and they are fine. Sunday or monday morning we can go and see the mock up for the pool pavillion.Please let me know if all this works! J.P.






__________________________________________________
